message:
feat(e2e/mt-mvcc-bench): add p95/p99 throughput columns to output table

Follow-up to the percentile-reporting commit that introduced p50/p95/
p99 for elapsed_ms. The same three percentiles are already computed
for writes_per_sec via RunStats::p95_writes_per_sec /
p99_writes_per_sec, but only the column headers for elapsed_ms were
emitted. Added four new columns so wps variance across samples is
visible alongside ms variance:

  fsqlite_wps_p95, fsqlite_wps_p99, sqlite_wps_p95, sqlite_wps_p99

Width specifiers widened to :>15.0 / :>14.0 so the wps percentile
columns align with the existing fs_wps / cs_wps columns. Existing
columns (ms p50/p95/p99 on both sides, time_ratio, failed counts)
are unchanged.

Printed table is now 17 columns wide but still emits a single
header row before the data rows.
